ValidationRule.description: Restricts users who have edit access on Asset from being able to edit required fields
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name = "Carlyle Commercial", OR( leaseworks__MSN_Number__c <> PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__MSN_Number__c), Name <> PRIORVALUE(Name), RecordTypeId <> PRIORVALUE(RecordTypeId), OwnerId <> PRIORVALUE(OwnerId) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You don't have the required permission to edit the fields on an Asset record.
